name: Delta SkyMiles® Reserve American Express Card

welcome_offer.description: Limited-time offer: Earn up to 125,000 Bonus Miles: 100,000 Bonus Miles after spending $6,000 in purchases in the first 6 months, plus an additional 25,000 Bonus Miles after spending an additional $3,000 in purchases in the first 6 months. Offer ends 7/15/2026.

lounge_access.other: 15 visits per year to Delta Sky Club when flying Delta; unlimited visits after spending $75,000 in a calendar year. Also receives complimentary access to The Centurion Lounge and Escape Lounges when flying Delta. 4 One-Time Guest Passes per Medallion Year.

other_benefits.name: Companion Certificate
other_benefits.description: Annual companion certificate valid for a First Class, Delta Comfort+, or Main Cabin round-trip flight to select destinations after renewal. Taxes/fees of $22-$250 apply.

other_benefits.name: MQD Headstart
other_benefits.description: $2,500 Medallion Qualification Dollars each Medallion Qualification Year.

other_benefits.name: MQD Boost
other_benefits.description: Earn $1 MQD for each $10 in purchases on the card (stronger than Platinum tier).

other_benefits.name: Free Checked Bag
other_benefits.description: First checked bag free for you and up to 8 companions on Delta flights.

other_benefits.name: Priority Boarding
other_benefits.description: Zone 5 priority boarding on Delta flights.

other_benefits.name: 15% Off Award Travel
other_benefits.description: 15% off when using miles to book Award Travel on Delta flights.

other_benefits.name: Upgrade Priority
other_benefits.description: Upgrade priority over others with the same Medallion tier, product, and fare experience.

other_benefits.name: Clear Discount
other_benefits.description: Discount on Clear+ membership based on SkyMiles status.

other_benefits.name: Second Checked Bag Free
other_benefits.description: Second checked bag free on domestic Delta-operated flights for eligible Basic Delta SkyMiles Gold, Platinum, and Reserve Card Members; terms apply.

other_benefits.name: Companion Certificate for Delta Vacations
other_benefits.description: Companion Certificate can now be redeemed toward the eligible flight portion of a Delta Vacations package; terms apply.

insurance.notes: Strong travel protections including trip cancellation/interruption. Trip delay requires delay >12 hours.

sources.notes: Current offer, lounge access details, earning rates, offer history, annual credits
Offer history and MQD headstart details
Delta personal card comparison page with current limited-time welcome offers and benefits
Delta News Hub official announcement: limited-time welcome offers and 2026 benefit updates

recurring_credits.name: Resy Credit
recurring_credits.description: $20/month ($240/year) at US Resy restaurants or eligible Resy purchases.

recurring_credits.name: Rideshare Credit
recurring_credits.description: $10/month ($120/year) on US rideshare with select providers (Uber, Lyft, Curb, Revel, Alto).

recurring_credits.name: Delta Stays Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $200/year on prepaid hotels via Delta Stays on delta.com.

recurring_credits.name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck
recurring_credits.description: Up to $120 statement credit every 4 years for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck application fee.
